description.from:
Removes your harmful effects and puts all allies into [Reading the Wind] state for 7sec, increasing ATK by 333*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Evasion Chance by 300.
When a target in [Reading the Wind] state successfully evades, all allies’ Critical DMG is increased by 2% for 7sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
description.to:
Removes all negative effects from self and grants all allies [Reading the Wind] for 7sec, increasing ATK by 302*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Evasion by 300.
If a target under [Reading the Wind] successfully evades, all allies’ Crit DMG is increased by 2% for 7sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.from: [Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by 5%, and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target’s Max HP.
description.to: [Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by 5%, and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target's Max HP.

description.from:
On hit, increases the target’s Physical Damage taken by {0}% and reduces Status Ailment Resistance by {1} for 10 sec.
If the target is a boss, damage dealt to the boss is increased by {2}%, and this boss damage increase effect stacks up to 10 times.
description.to: On hit, increases the target's Physical Damage taken by {0}% and reduces Status Ailment Resistance by 100 for {1} sec. If the target is a boss, damage dealt to the boss is increased by {4}%, and this boss damage increase effect stacks up to 10 times.
